reason: The inference type is listed as 'assumption', but this node is not an assumption -- it is an application of the Artin-Wedderburn theorem (an external, well-known result in algebra) to the finite-dimensionality established in 1.4.1. The inference type should be changed to reflect that this is a theorem application or external citation, not an axiom/assumption of the proof system. While this does not affect mathematical correctness, it misrepresents the logical status of the node in the proof framework.
